description.en: Ontology for European Medical Devices and In Vitro Diagnostics (MDR/IVDR).

comment.ca: Qualsevol instrument, aparell o programari destinat a fins mčdics segons MDR.
Probabilitat d'ocurrčncia d'un dany i la gravetat d'aquest dany.
Esdeveniment que afecta la seguretat o el funcionament normal del dispositiu.

comment.en: Led to death or serious injury.
Relates a manufacturer to its geographical country.
Inferred property linking action to device.
Relates a device to its regulatory risk class.
Inferred property linking device to country.
Relates an incident to the medical device involved.
Inferred property linking device to risk.
Relates a corrective action (FSCA) to the incident it resolves.
Relates a medical device to its manufacturer.
Relates an incident to the specific IMDRF risk that caused it.
